title: draba mollissima
intro: Draba mollissima, also known as Chinese whitlow grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been utilized in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Draba mollissima include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and consumed as a powder or capsule.
